Description: Upon arriving in Ja Tiika Heartland to collect medicinal fungi, a gatherer of the Hoobigo discovers the area crawling with hungry fly agarics. And thus has the mushroom hunter become the mushroom hunted.

Upon arriving in the Ja Tiika Heartland to collect medicinal fungi, a gatherer of the Hoobigo discovers the area crawling with hungry fly agarics. And thus has the mushroom hunter become the mushroom hunted.
Objective: Deliver ik'iit ears to the Hoobigo forager.

Description: A party of hunters find themselves surrounded by a pack of cauahealoas and require a distraction so that they might
A party of hunters find themselves surrounded by a pack of cauahealoas and require a distraction so that they might get to safety.
